headline: Morgan Stanley Reiterates Underweight on Consolidated Edison (ED) Following Target Cut
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.34% as of May 29, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks. On May 21, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) to $99 from $105. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The analyst said […]
